meaning: vt.计算,总计,估计,猜想vi.数,计算,估计,依赖,料想
examples: I reckon she's pulling in over $100 000.
I reckon (that) I'm going to get that job.
They reckon (that) their profits are down by at least 20%.
We've had a quick chat in this office and reckon it's the first time we've seen it happen.
Naturally, Sina and Alibaba reckon that they can wring much more from their combined efforts.
